PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -eq 14692 -or $_.ProcessId -eq 26160 } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List)

PowerShell($pids = \(netstat -ano | findstr ":8000" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[-1] } | Sort-Object -Unique\); foreach \($p in $pids\) { taskkill /F /PID $p 2>&1 }; Start-Sleep 2; netstat -ano | findstr ":8000")
